title.en: NUCLEAR POWER PLANT
Details of nuclear power plant (control G21D0003000000)
Arrangements of auxiliary equipment

title.ko: 펌프(pump)계의 구성(원자로 압력용기내의 수단에 의한 것 G21G 15/24)
title.en: Pumping arrangements (by means within the reactor pressure vessel G21C0015240000)
Control of nuclear power plant (control of nuclear reaction G21C0007000000)
Manual control
Safety arrangements (emergency protection of reactor G21C0009000000)

title.ko: 발전소내의 사고에 감응하는 것(원자로내의 사고에 감응하는 것 G21C 9/02)
title.en: responsive to faults within the plant (in the reactor G21C0009020000)
Regulation of any parameters in the plant
by a combination of a variable derived from neutron flux with other controlling variables, e.g. derived from temperature, cooling flow, pressure
by adjustment of the reactor in response only to changes in engine demand
Varying flow of coolant
Varying reactivity
by adjustment of plant external to the reactor only in response to change in reactivity
Arrangements of reactor and engine in which reactor-produced heat is converted into mechanical energy
Reactor and engine structurally combined, e.g. portable
Reactor and engine not structurally combined
with engine working medium circulating through reactor core
with engine working medium heated in a heat exchanger by the reactor coolant
Liquid working medium partially heated by reactor and vaporised by heat source external to the core, e.g. with oil heating
Liquid working medium vaporised by reactor coolant
and also superheated by reactor coolant
superheated by separate heat source

title.ko: 핵융합 또는 핵분열반응에서 직접발전을 하기 위한 구성(방사선원에서 전기에너지를 얻는 것 G21H 1/00)
title.en: Arrangements for direct production of electric energy from fusion or fission reactions (obtaining electric energy from radioactive sources G21H0001000000)
using magneto-hydrodynamic generators

title.ko: 열전소자를 사용하는 것(연료와 열전소자와의 구조상 의 결합 G21C 3/40)
title.en: using thermoelectric elements (structural combination of fuel element with thermoelectric element G21C0003400000)
Arrangements to provide heat for purposes other than conversion into power, e.g. for heating buildings
